# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build & Deployment Workflow

on: 
  push:
    branches: [ main ] # Change this according to your requirements

env:
  REGISTRY_URL: ghcr.io # Configure registry url
  IMAGE_NAME: username/repositoryname # Configure image name

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted # Run on self hosted runners in datacenter
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1

      - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v1 
        with:
          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY_URL }}
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v2
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ env.REGISTRY_URL }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest
      
      - name: Deploy to Datacenter # Insert your deployment commands here
        run: |
          ssh user@datacenter "docker pull ${{ env.REGISTRY_URL }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest"
          ssh user@datacenter "docker-compose up -d"
